Safety & Quality

Quality Check Procedure and Testing Workflow

SGB applies documented quality checks together with specialized testing workflows and equipment records.

  • Fluke Cable Analyzer DSX5000
  • Anritsu Site Master S331L

Compliance Context

Quality and testing are presented together with the company's certification stack of ISO 9001, ISO 45001, bizSAFE STAR, and BCA certification.
